meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože mezery jsou součástí referenčního obrázku přerušované čáry

cms.task_text: Přerušovaná čára se nezačala kreslit. [hlp]Doplňte na začátek blok pro spuštění pera[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
